description: Retrieval-augmented support assistant (modules 05/11): a subject asks a question, the app retrieves from an internal knowledge base and answers via an LLM, with feedback and tracing. Every store below is described with synthetic governance metadata only; this is engineering practice, not legal advice.

stores.description: Primary records: subject profile + support question.
stores.purpose: Serve the support request and let the subject view their history.
stores.access_control: RBAC; tenant-scoped rows; encrypted at rest.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Hard delete by subject_id on erasure request; cascades to derived stores.

stores.description: The prompt assembled from retrieved chunks + the (redacted) subject fields.
stores.purpose: Instruct the model for this single request.
stores.access_control: In-process only; never persisted raw; restricted fields redacted before assembly.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Garbage-collected at end of request; nothing to delete.

stores.description: Chat request sent to the hosted model provider.
stores.access_control: TLS in transit; redacted payload; provider bound by data-processing terms; no-training flag set.
stores.retention: Per provider abuse-monitoring window (documented in the vendor DPA).
stores.deletion_mechanism: Vendor deletion request / zero-retention endpoint where contracted.

stores.description: Chunk embeddings + chunk text for retrieval (a derived copy of source docs).
stores.purpose: Semantic retrieval over the knowledge base.
stores.access_control: RBAC; tenant-scoped collections; encrypted at rest.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Delete vectors by source doc_id / subject_id; re-index on document removal.

stores.description: Cache of prompt->response pairs and retrieval results.
stores.purpose: Reduce latency and provider cost for repeated queries.
stores.access_control: Internal service only; keyed by hash of redacted prompt; encrypted at rest.
stores.deletion_mechanism: TTL expiry + explicit purge by cache key on subject deletion.

stores.description: Structured request logs (field actions, redacted record, timings, correlation id).
stores.purpose: Debugging, audit of redaction decisions, and operations.
stores.access_control: Restricted log platform; raw restricted/confidential values excluded by policy.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Rolling retention window; logs keyed by pseudonymous subject_id for targeted purge.

stores.description: Spans/traces of the request pipeline sent to a hosted observability vendor.
stores.access_control: Vendor SSO/RBAC; redacted attributes only; bound by vendor DPA.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Vendor trace deletion API by trace/subject id; retention window auto-expiry.

stores.description: Thumbs up/down and free-text feedback tied to an answer.
stores.access_control: RBAC; free-text scanned for PII before use in evals.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Delete by subject_id / answer_id; excluded from eval sets on deletion.

stores.description: Arguments and results of tool calls (e.g. account lookup) made while answering.
stores.purpose: Task execution and post-hoc debugging of tool behaviour.
stores.access_control: Internal only; args validated; secrets never persisted.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Rolling window purge; delete by correlation/subject id on request.

stores.description: Generated summaries, extracted entities, and eval-scored answers derived from subject data.
stores.purpose: Faster future answers and aggregate quality metrics.
stores.access_control: RBAC; treated as personal data because it is derived from it.
stores.deletion_mechanism: Delete/tombstone by source subject_id; aggregates recomputed without the record.

stores.description: Encrypted point-in-time backups of the app db and vector index.
stores.access_control: Break-glass access only; encrypted at rest; access logged.
stores.retention: 35 days (documented retention exception vs. live-store deletion).
stores.deletion_mechanism: Deletion propagates on restore + backup rotation; erasure log notes the exception window.
